headline:
AI Research Scientist Intern at DRW
PhD Candidate at MILA / Polytechnique Montreal
bioMarkdown:
I build things at the intersection of optimization and continual learning. Currently an AI Research Scientist Intern at [DRW](https://drw.com/) in Montreal, and a PhD candidate at [MILA](https://mila.quebec/en/) / [Polytechnique Montreal](https://www.polymtl.ca) under [Prof. Sarath Chandar](https://sarathchandar.in).

My research asks how models can keep learning without forgetting, and how optimizers can navigate loss landscapes more effectively. Some highlights: [Manifold Metric](https://arxiv.org/abs/2405.15895) (CoLLAs 2025, Oral), [Lookbehind-SAM](https://arxiv.org/abs/2307.16704) (ICML 2024), [Critical Momenta](https://arxiv.org/abs/2307.09638) (TMLR 2024), and [TAG](https://arxiv.org/abs/2105.05155) (CoLLAs 2022).

Before Montreal, I completed my MS at [IIT Madras](https://www.iitm.ac.in) working with [Prof. Balaraman Ravindran](https://www.cse.iitm.ac.in/~ravi/) and Prof. Chandar at [RBCDSAI](https://rbcdsai.iitm.ac.in).

When not working: [sketching](/photos/), [hiking](/photos/), reading non-fiction, cricket, and [travelling](/photos/) (4/7 wonders so far).
blogTagline: Book notes, research reflections, and the occasional deep dive.
